children.text_content: Didn't find the answer to your question?
How do you ensure transparency and  avoid sleazy sales tactics?
We believe in honest, upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Our team provides detailed written estimates before any work begins, and we never use high-pressure sales techniques.
How do I request a price match?
Simply show us a written estimate from a licensed competitor for the same scope of work, and we'll match or beat their price.
What safeguards are in place to prevent  overpayment?
We provide itemized quotes, explain every cost, and never charge for work that wasn't agreed upon in advance.
How do you handle situations where a  competitor offers a lower rate?
We welcome the opportunity to review competing offers. If a licensed competitor provides the same scope of work at a lower price, we'll match it.
How does billing work with you?
We offer flexible payment options including $0 down financing. You only pay for completed, inspected work.
21634 Redwood Rd Unit F Castro Valley CA 94546

rated 5/5 based on 50 reviews.

Bay Areas Favorite Construction Company

Licensed Bonded & Insured
Start with $0 Down
50 year Warranty
3-5 day install
Call Us - We Answer Fast

Get a FREE QUOTE

We'll contact you in 3-5 minutes to schedule a FREE roof inspection.

+1

Trusted By

Certified, highly trained installers delivering top-quality service.

OUR REVIEWS FOR EXTERIOR REMODELING

We put our promises before we take our profits.

Eric W

2 months ago

Hamilton Exteriors did an amazing job on my roof. The team was professional, and the quality of work was top-notch. Highly recommend!

Read more

Eric W

2 months ago

The team at Hamilton Exteriors was respectful, on time, and did excellent work. They made sure to communicate with us throughout the entire process, ensuring we were informed every step of the way. Our new siding looks beautiful, and the quality of the materials they used is top-notch. The crew worked efficiently and left our property clean and tidy. We couldn’t be happier with the final result and would highly recommend Hamilton Exteriors for any home improvement needs!

Read more

Robert Holt

4 months ago

We’d been putting off replacing the windows in our home for years, but we finally decided it was time. From the very first consultation with Hamilton Exteriors, we knew we’d made the right choice. The team was not only knowledgeable but genuinely listened to our concerns about energy efficiency and design. When the windows were installed, we were amazed at how much brighter and more comfortable our home felt. It’s been a few months now, and we’ve already noticed a drop in our energy bills. It’s like we’re living in a new house, and we couldn’t be happier with the transformation!

Read more

Laura Gaubin

4 months ago

Hamilton Exteriors repaired extensive dry rot damage on our home’s exterior. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality were evident throughout the project. The crew was polite, professional, and ensured the site was clean before leaving each day. Our home looks better than ever, and we have peace of mind knowing the repairs were done correctly. We highly recommend their services.

Read more

Call Now - We Answer Fast

Financing Options Available For Everyone

At Hamilton Exteriors, we offer flexible financing solutions for every homeowner. Whether you have high or low credit, we have options to fit your needs. Our partnerships with various lenders enable us to provide competitive rates and terms for all credit profiles. Don't let financial concerns delay your project - let us help you find the perfect financing solution.

Let's discuss your financial options. Quick Response

Call Now (650) 977-3351
Schedule a FREE Inspection

OUR MISSION

At Hamilton Exteriors, our mission is to serve our community with the highest-value construction solutions. Specializing in roofs, windows, and siding, we bring over 50 years of combined experience to every project. Our skilled team takes pride in meticulous craftsmanship and attention to detail, ensuring every job is done right the first time.

Rated 4.8 Stars by Sacramento Homeowners – See Why Customers Love Us!

4.8
Rated 4.5/5.0
Trustpilot Rated 4.5/5.0
4.8
Rated 4.5/5.0
Rated 4.5/5.0

Exterior Services Offered in castro valley, ca

Roofing

Composite shingles are durable roofing materials made from a mixture of fiberglass, asphalt, and mineral granules. They offer excellent weather resistance and come in a variety of styles and colors to suit different architectural designs.

Siding

Metal roofs offer outstanding longevity and energy efficiency, lasting up to 50 years or more. They come in various styles and colors, providing excellent protection against extreme weather while reflecting solar radiant heat to reduce cooling costs.

Windows

Tile roofing offers exceptional durability and aesthetic appeal, with options ranging from traditional clay to modern concrete designs. These versatile materials provide excellent insulation and fire resistance, making them a popular choice for homeowners seeking long-lasting, attractive roofing solutions.

Waterproofing

The GAF Energy roof integrates solar technology directly into roofing materials, combining energy production with traditional roof protection. This innovative system offers a sleek, low-profile alternative to conventional solar panels while providing clean energy and potential savings on electricity bills.

The Hamilton
Exteriors Difference

Best Price Guarantee

We promise the most competitive rates in the industry. If you find a lower rate elsewhere, we will gladly beat or match it for you.

Factory Trained Installers

All our contractors are licensed, bonded, insured, and undergo thorough background and business checks.

Industry Leading Warranties

Our roofs are protected by industry-leading warranties, including up to a 50-year shingle warranty and a 35-year labor warranty.

Personal Project Manager

Enjoy a seamless renovation with a dedicated project manager handling all details and communication.

Get Started with as Little as $0 Down*

* Depending on credit score
Call Right Now and Request a Free Inspection

Fill out the form, and our assistant will contact you within 5 minutes. A specialist will visit within 3 working days for a detailed estimate.

Call Now (650) 977-3351 Schedule a FREE Inspection

Frequently Asked Questions

Didn't find the answer to your question? Call Now (650) 977-3351

How do you ensure transparency and avoid sleazy sales tactics?

We believe in honest, upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Our team provides detailed written estimates before any work begins, and we never use high-pressure sales techniques.

How do I request a price match?

Simply show us a written estimate from a licensed competitor for the same scope of work, and we'll match or beat their price.

What safeguards are in place to prevent overpayment?

We provide itemized quotes, explain every cost, and never charge for work that wasn't agreed upon in advance.

How do you handle situations where a competitor offers a lower rate?

We welcome the opportunity to review competing offers. If a licensed competitor provides the same scope of work at a lower price, we'll match it.

How does billing work with you?

We offer flexible payment options including $0 down financing. You only pay for completed, inspected work.

(650) 977-3351
support@hamilton-exteriors.com
21634 Redwood Rd Unit F Castro Valley CA 94546

Contact Us

Quick Response, Expert Assessment

Which type of consultation would you prefer?

I'd like to learn more about Hamilton Exteriors. Please contact me at the phone number I listed above to schedule a convenient day and time for an in-home price quote. I am submitting this form so you can contact me and keep me informed about your products, services, and sales. I understand that I do not need to submit this form to schedule an in-home price quote.

Instead, I may call your service center at the number on this page. I understand that all calls are recorded. Hamilton Exteriors collects certain categories of personal information and uses this information for various purposes, including order fulfillment and providing product information and services to you. For more information, visit our privacy policy.
